title: fix: construct Azure GPT Image endpoints from base URL
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Routing the Azure pipes
gist.blurb: We've tidied up how we connect to Azure's GPT Image models under the hood. Smoother routing means more reliable pixel delivery!
gist.summary: Refactored the Azure GPT Image endpoint construction to use base URLs and paths instead of regex replacements.
gist.impact: Improves the reliability and maintainability of our image generation backend when connecting to Azure services.
gist.visual_concept: Connecting pipes or routing cables to represent URL construction. Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot working together to connect glowing cables.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny hard hat, working with a chunky monitor-head robot to connect glowing lime green (#ecf874) cables in a server room. Soft pastel lavender and cream gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
